meals.assessment: Strong high-protein breakfast -- 45g protein supports satiety and muscle repair; likely ~350-450 kcal with the banana/PB carbs and fat. Solid start.

meals.description: Acai Berry Energy Mio, 1 serving in water
meals.assessment: Adds ~90mg caffeine (roughly one cup of coffee's worth). Fine for a morning boost -- just worth cutting off caffeine by early-mid afternoon so it doesn't work against the 11:00 PM lights-out goal.

meals.description: Cafe Rio handheld burrito: white rice, black beans, sweet pork, cheese, pico de gallo, tomatillo ranch; 16 oz Coke Zero
meals.assessment: Solid protein from the pork, but this is a calorie-dense meal -- handheld burritos with rice, beans, cheese, and dressing commonly run 700-900+ kcal, plus sodium adds up fast between the meat, cheese, and dressing. Coke Zero adds caffeine but no sugar/calories.

meals.description: Acai Berry Energy Mio again, 1 serving in water
meals.assessment: Second caffeinated serving today (~90mg on top of the morning one, ~180mg total) -- still generally fine, but worth watching the clock so it clears well before the 11:00 PM sleep goal.
Great balanced dinner -- lean protein from the grilled chicken, fiber and micronutrients from the broccoli, and complex carbs from the potatoes. Clean way to close out the day's eating.
